CREATE TABLE demo_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255));
CREATE TABLE demo_related_table (related_id INT PRIMARY KEY, demo_id INT, FOREIGN KEY(demo_id) REFERENCES demo_table(id));
CREATE VIEW demo_view AS SELECT d.id, d.name FROM demo_table d JOIN demo_related_table r ON d.id = r.demo_id;
CREATE PUBLICATION demo_publication FOR TABLE demo_table, TABLE demo_related_table;
SELECT * FROM demo_view WHERE id IN (SELECT demo_id FROM demo_related_table WHERE related_id = 1);
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_table (temp_id INT PRIMARY KEY, temp_name VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO temp_table (temp_id, temp_name) SELECT id, name FROM demo_table WHERE id <= 1;
